title: Xtra Light Australian Pork Knuckle Braise
description: A light and flavorful Australian dish featuring pork knuckle, perfect for a crowd, with a mustardy twist and satvik-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Place the pork knuckle in a large pot and add enough water to cover it.
Add the white vinegar, Dijon mustard, honey, thyme, bay leaves, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 hours.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Remove the pork knuckle from the pot and place it on a cutting board.
Strain the cooking liquid and discard the solids.
Slice the pork knuckle into thick slices and serve with the strained cooking liquid spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh thyme sprigs, if desired.
